title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There. My preparations are complete.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Do you have any concerns?
choice_data_list: I was just thinking how you have so many rivals.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's true. Every one of them possesses
great speed and strength.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I will push past all of them. That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I don't... defeating the Beast will forever be out
of reach.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's almost time. I must be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I'm so nervous...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right, Spe? Try taking a few deep
breaths.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'll try! Inhale... Inhaaale!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That's right, Spe. Now let it out, slowly.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh, with all these big names around, I doubt
there'll be much chance for me to shine.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, I'm just gonna coast on through. Don't
mind me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Really?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But alas... As much as I'd love to grant that
request...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I can ignore someone whose eyes are
screaming, "I'm gonna win."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Oops. Shoulda worn my shades.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass! Today, let's have the ultimate race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We gotta show our fans the race they've been
dyin' to see!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can already see my victory celebration...
Passion! Applause! The crowd goes wiiiiild!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Are you sure that's how it will turn out? Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby is here at last!
